## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / section
- [ ] Style / visual tweak
- [ ] Refactor (no user-facing change)
- [ ] Content update (copy, images, links)

## Testing

- [ ] `npm run dev` — verified locally in the browser
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] Checked responsive layout (mobile + desktop)

## Checklist

- [ ] No unrelated changes bundled in
- [ ] Linked issue (if any): Closes #
